## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Knapsack (AI note-taking app) and GrowthX (digital marketing agency) to discuss product feedback, user experience, and content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/kRb6aAsaRzkGh_L8Gfxix1shby1zkwcq?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Identified several UX improvements for Knapsack's onboarding process and app interface](https://fathom.video/share/kRb6aAsaRzkGh_L8Gfxix1shby1zkwcq?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Discussed content strategy focusing on AI note-taker comparisons and financial advisor-specific content](https://fathom.video/share/kRb6aAsaRzkGh_L8Gfxix1shby1zkwcq?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [Analyzed recent drop in search performance, attributing it to fluctuations in AI-related search trends](https://fathom.video/share/kRb6aAsaRzkGh_L8Gfxix1shby1zkwcq?tab=summary&timestamp=793.0)
  - [Emphasized need for clearer communication about Knapsack's privacy features throughout user journey](https://fathom.video/share/kRb6aAsaRzkGh_L8Gfxix1shby1zkwcq?tab=summary&timestamp=1206.0)

## Topics

### Knapsack App Onboarding and UX Feedback

  - [Download speed (400-500MB) may be an issue for users with slower connections](https://fathom.video/share/kRb6aAsaRzkGh_L8Gfxix1shby1zkwcq?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [App store listing could mitigate security warnings during installation](https://fathom.video/share/kRb6aAsaRzkGh_L8Gfxix1shby1zkwcq?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Calendar sync didn't work automatically, requiring manual setup](https://fathom.video/share/kRb6aAsaRzkGh_L8Gfxix1shby1zkwcq?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)
  - [Intro video needs a more prominent thumbnail and clear call-to-action](https://fathom.video/share/kRb6aAsaRzkGh_L8Gfxix1shby1zkwcq?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
  - [Recording permission process is confusing and needs streamlining](https://fathom.video/share/kRb6aAsaRzkGh_L8Gfxix1shby1zkwcq?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Clearer indication of active recording status needed (e.g., timer)](https://fathom.video/share/kRb6aAsaRzkGh_L8Gfxix1shby1zkwcq?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

### Content and SEO Strategy

  - [Recent drop in search clicks (from 230 to 171) attributed to AI search trend fluctuations](https://fathom.video/share/kRb6aAsaRzkGh_L8Gfxix1shby1zkwcq?tab=summary&timestamp=793.0)
  - [Focus on creating 75 AI note-taker comparison pieces](https://fathom.video/share/kRb6aAsaRzkGh_L8Gfxix1shby1zkwcq?tab=summary&timestamp=1022.0)
  - [Incorporate financial advisor-specific snippets in content to target key audience](https://fathom.video/share/kRb6aAsaRzkGh_L8Gfxix1shby1zkwcq?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)
  - [Backlink campaign targeting 19 companies with positive, detailed write-ups](https://fathom.video/share/kRb6aAsaRzkGh_L8Gfxix1shby1zkwcq?tab=summary&timestamp=1147.0)

### Privacy and Data Handling

  - [Recording happens locally, then sent to Grok Cloud for transcription](https://fathom.video/share/kRb6aAsaRzkGh_L8Gfxix1shby1zkwcq?tab=summary&timestamp=1206.0)
  - [Data is deleted immediately after processing](https://fathom.video/share/kRb6aAsaRzkGh_L8Gfxix1shby1zkwcq?tab=summary&timestamp=1220.0)
  - [Need for clearer communication about privacy throughout user journey](https://fathom.video/share/kRb6aAsaRzkGh_L8Gfxix1shby1zkwcq?tab=summary&timestamp=1340.0)
  - [Suggestion to create an infographic explaining the privacy process in simple steps](https://fathom.video/share/kRb6aAsaRzkGh_L8Gfxix1shby1zkwcq?tab=summary&timestamp=1501.0)

### Product Feature Requests

  - [Multi-account support for users with multiple Gmail IDs (planned for future)](https://fathom.video/share/kRb6aAsaRzkGh_L8Gfxix1shby1zkwcq?tab=summary&timestamp=1614.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Implement UX improvements: video thumbnail, recording indicator, permission flow](https://fathom.video/share/kRb6aAsaRzkGh_L8Gfxix1shby1zkwcq?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Create infographic explaining Knapsack's privacy features and data handling](https://fathom.video/share/kRb6aAsaRzkGh_L8Gfxix1shby1zkwcq?tab=summary&timestamp=1501.0)
  - [Develop 75 AI note-taker comparison articles with financial advisor focus](https://fathom.video/share/kRb6aAsaRzkGh_L8Gfxix1shby1zkwcq?tab=summary&timestamp=1022.0)
  - [Monitor search performance and adjust content strategy if downward trend continues](https://fathom.video/share/kRb6aAsaRzkGh_L8Gfxix1shby1zkwcq?tab=summary&timestamp=793.0)
  - [Improve messaging around privacy throughout the app and website](https://fathom.video/share/kRb6aAsaRzkGh_L8Gfxix1shby1zkwcq?tab=summary&timestamp=1340.0)
  - [Investigate and fix issues with recording permissions and functionality](https://fathom.video/share/kRb6aAsaRzkGh_L8Gfxix1shby1zkwcq?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
